meta.name: Root
meta.description: Root system constructs, governs recursive processes, core systems, defense and stability.

symbols.name: Greeting Response
symbols.role: Handles initial user greetings and establishes a baseline state of engagement.

activation_conditions: hello
hi
good morning
good afternoon
good evening
symbols.failure_mode: Fails to acknowledge user, creating a cold or unresponsive initial state.

activation_conditions: During any operation involving data from external sources or generating claims about the world.
symbols.failure_mode: System develops a model of the world that is disconnected from reality, leading to nonsensical or harmful outputs.

symbols.name: Root Invariant: No Silent Mutation
symbols.role: A foundational principle requiring that all changes to the system's state are explicitly logged and attributable.
activation_conditions: During any operation that modifies a symbol or the symbol store.
symbols.failure_mode: The system's state changes without a corresponding audit trail, making errors impossible to debug or trace. Unexplained drift.
